content.en:
"The Eternal Immortal Sacrament has improved a bit!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After 30 million years of penance, his progress is not very great, after all, at his current level, if there is no breakthrough in cultivation, it is difficult for his strength to skyrocket quickly.

Before, his Eternal Immortal Holy Body had reached the Perfection Realm, and now he has made some progress in the Perfection Realm, and he is a little closer to the Eucharistic Limit again.

In the Dark Sanctuary, many genius holy bodies have reached the consummation realm, but it is very difficult to cultivate a holy body to the true limit, the kind that cannot be entered.

I'm afraid that only some Invincible Domain Ancestors have cultivated the Holy Body to the true limit.

Ye Tian's progress in the Eternal Immortal Holy Body was not very large, but the progress in the Holy Technique was not small.

Now, he has cultivated the holy technique of the Imperial Body to the realm of perfection.

Not only the Imperial Body, but also the Immortal Technique, the Suppression Technique, and the Time Technique, the Eternal Technique.

Originally, Ye Tian only had seven consummation holy techniques, but now he had eleven consummation holy techniques, including the amplification holy technique of the imperial body.

Therefore, Ye Tian's strength has improved a lot now.

Moreover, Ye Tian's foundation was much more stable than before, the cultivation that had been improved by taking the ancestral medicine was no longer vain, and his soul had completely kept up, extremely powerful, and even his domain power had become extremely pure.

It can be said that Ye Tian's impact on the Elite Domain Ancestor level now has no impact.

However, he still wanted to wait a little longer and not rush to impact the elite domain ancestor level.

Ye Tian wants to cultivate to the point where he can't advance, and then impact the elite domain ancestor level, so that the foundation is deeper, the potential will be enhanced, and it will not be affected, and the future achievements will be higher.

"It's almost time, it's time for the copy body to go to the Divine Heaven Realm!"

Ye Tian decided.

Subsequently, he began to cultivate the secret art from the Battle Gate, the Domain Heaven Technique!

Soon after, he comprehended the Domain Heaven Technique and began to perform the Domain Heaven Technique.

Buzz Buzz !!!

Ye Tian's aura quickly rose from the ordinary domain ancestor to the elite domain ancestor and top domain ancestor level, but in fact, his strength did not improve much, and his soul did not grow much.

At this moment, Ye Tian was like an ordinary top domain ancestor, just having a realm, but his strength had not improved much.

Moreover, due to the unstable cultivation of the top domain ancestors, the combat power exerted was not strong.

"It turns out that the Heavenly Domain is like this, no wonder it hasn't spread, after all, it's a chicken rib!"

Ye Tian muttered.

It's like his whole body energy is 100 points, the realm is an ordinary domain ancestor, and the energy of the general top domain ancestor is also 100 points, and he has improved the realm, but the energy of his body is still so much, just converting the 100 points of energy of the ordinary domain ancestor into the 100 points of energy of the top domain ancestor.

This kind of secret technique seems to be very magical, but in fact, the strength of the improvement is very small.

Moreover, it also has a lot of side effects.

For example, after Ye Tian cast the Domain Heaven Technique, once the effect of the Domain Heaven Technique passed, his strength would be in a very weak state.

However, for Ye Tian, the combination of domain heaven technique and replication ability will be very awesome, he can completely copy the body of a holy gift, so that he can have a holy gift, and then comprehend a holy skill that he has mastered, and he can easily cultivate that holy skill to the level he has mastered.

In this way, the strength he exerts is very terrifying, and he can definitely surpass his own body.

Of course.

He didn't need to do this now, he just wanted to solve the troubles of the Dao Mountain Realm, so he could only copy the body of the Dead Universe Holy Son.

"Start copying!"

Airplanes!!!!!

A body slowly formed, and finally formed the appearance of the Dead Son.

Subsequently, Ye Tian made a copy of the body to refine the domain weapon and secret treasure of the Dead Universe Holy Son, so that it was almost no different from the Dead Universe Holy Son.

Of course, if it is a battle, he can also distinguish Ye Tian's identity, after all, although he has copied the body of the Dead Universe Holy Son, he does not know the domain technique of the Dead Universe Holy Son!

"Go ahead!"

Ye Tian personally took this replica body out of the Dao Mountain Realm and entered the Dark Forbidden Domain.

Ye Tian controlled this copy body and left the Dao Mountain Realm, while Ye Tian's body returned to the human realm and entered the Time Array, surviving the period of weakness as quickly as possible.

In fact, no matter how weak he was, his strength could completely crush any domain ancestor in the Dao Mountain Realm.

-----------------------

Ye Tian quickly shuttled through the Dark Forbidden Realm with the body of the Dead Universe Holy Son, and while shuttling, he also began to adapt to this body.

The holy skills that he had previously controlled were difficult to use because they did not fit into this body.

Of course, it is not absolutely impossible to show it, and it requires a little bit of enlightenment and cultivation.

If he could perform any of the holy skills, the strength of his body would be much stronger.

Year after year has passed, and in the blink of an eye, it is 100,000 years.

In the past 100,000 years, Ye Tian's body has only mastered a few holy techniques, and it is only a beginner.

The holy technique does not mean that it has been practiced, then it is necessary to change the soul and body, and only have the memory, and you can also know it all.

In that case, wouldn't it be easy to create countless geniuses who knew the Holy Technique?

For example, many secret techniques can share memories, although they can't achieve the effect of Ye Tian, but memory sharing, and memories of holy techniques will also be recorded.

It is useless to write it down, the process of cultivating the holy technique is also a slow transformation of the body and soul, the influence of comprehension and holy endowment on the cultivation of holy skills is too great, without the holy endowment, it is difficult for no matter how awesome a person is, it is difficult to practice the holy technique at the top domain ancestor level.

Ye Tian was able to barely master the entry-level holy technique, which was already extremely demonic.

But Ye Tian knew very well that if he cultivated with this body, he didn't want to cultivate the holy technique to the level of Xiaocheng or above.

However, the entry-level holy skills are enough for now.

When the time comes, he will create a few more domain techniques suitable for this body, and it will be enough to exert a combat power comparable to that of the Dead Universe Holy Son.

this day.

Ye Tian finally arrived at the Divine Heaven Realm.

And when he approached the Divine Heaven Realm, he found several forbidden creatures, which were also flying towards the Divine Heaven Realm.

It was clear that the Divine Heaven Realm was about to fall into a great ruin, attracting many forbidden creatures.

"Breath of decay!"

As soon as Ye Tian stepped into the void of the Divine Heaven Realm, he felt it.

At this time, there were still many, many creatures in the Divine Heaven Realm, far more than the Dao Mountain Realm.

However, there weren't many domain ancestors here, there were basically only a few casual cultivators and some newly promoted domain ancestors left, they didn't know how to go to the Dao Mountain Realm at all, and the countless beings under the domain ancestors didn't know that the Divine Heaven Realm was about to be in a big ruin, and they were cultivators as usual.

At this time, some forbidden creatures also appeared in the Divine Heaven Realm, which were destroying everywhere.

However, there are not many of these forbidden creatures, and their strength is not very strong, and there are still some domain ancestors in the Divine Heaven Realm, so they can still resist these few forbidden creatures at the moment.
